title: Station platforms and design - Europe
description: Mod for custom 3D platforms and design features like platform numbers.
body:
# **Description**
**Hi, it seems like you are interested in my mod, that is good! Because have you ever thought while building your own train station, that is quite empty or same as every other station. I believe I can fix it, with my mod you have now more types of platforms, every platform is custom 3D modeled and is unique.**
# **Future?**
**What can you await in future,**
 I am planning to add off course more platform types but not only that, decorations to station, like trash bins, security cameras (only as a decoration), platform numbers, etc.
